Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 13 

Appendix B — Supplemental Data 

The CCW team compared the “ever” dates for the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions in the MBSF_CC_2017 to the “ever” 
dates for the same conditions in the MBSF_CHRONIC_2017 file. We classify beneficiaries with an “ever” date in either 
file into one of three categories: 1) having an “ever” date in both files, 2) “ever” date
